General.Name: Lhyfe SA
General.Description: Lhyfe SA produces and supplies renewable green hydrogen for mobility and industry markets. The company designs, installs, and operates onshore, on-site, and offshore industrial green hydrogen production units that offers hydrogen through bulk deliveries, and pipelines and on-site supply. It serves chemical, metallurgy, glass, and cement industries. The company was founded in 2017 and is based in Nantes, France.
